## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits style
- [ ] All source code text is in English (comments, logs, identifiers)
- [ ] Tests added or updated (happy path + error path for new tool adapters)
- [ ] Documentation updated where behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data committed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the `Unreleased` section for user-visible changes
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
